articles.author: Sean O'Kane
articles.title: Ferrari’s first EV is not for you - TechCrunch
articles.description: The Ferrari Luce seems to be more aimed at regulatory compliance and China, putting a lot of pressure on the Jony Ive-designed EV.
articles.content:
Everyone seems to be mad about Ferrari’s first electric vehicle.
Called Luce and revealed on Monday, the design of the five-seater (gasp!) was led in large part by Jony Ive and the design firm he ru… [+4192 chars]
